name: 06-04-new-chat-branching-language
title: Reframe new chat and reset as story branch controls
description: Add visitor-facing branch language and local restart controls so users understand they can continue the current memory-backed run or start a fresh entrance branch without deleting long-term memory.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed frontend-only story branch controls for native /tavern/:id and legacy product chat. Validation passed: typecheck, build, diff --check, Playwright desktop/mobile visual acceptance. react-doctor was attempted but blocked: sandbox npm cache EPERM, escalated unpinned npm execution rejected for supply-chain risk. Restart action only resets transient UI chat state and returns to doorway; no API/Schema/database change and no memory deletion.
